- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\FeatureWheel\\\\FeatureWheelTypes.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 純邏輯層\\n * 不依賴 cc 框架型別，可獨立單元測試（對應 P1 設計分層：功能層）\\n * 內容：segment 資料模型、server 介面 adapter、角度計算、type→icon 對照\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 轉輪格子功能類型\\n * ⚠️ 數值「刻意對齊後端 server enum」：None=-1, FreeGame=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, Transfer(符號轉換)=3, Grand(GrandJP)=4\\n * 目前 server↔client 同號 → ParseServerWheelData 直接 passthrough（不做映射）。\\n * 若後端日後改號，務必改回「保留本地編號 + 在 ParseServerWheelData 內加映射層」，不可讓兩邊默默錯位。\\n * 數值契約由測試「enum 對齊 server」鎖定，誤改 enum 值會讓測試變紅。\\n */\\nexport enum FeatureWheelSegmentType {\\n    /**@ch 未觸發（空格，不顯示 icon）*/\\n    None = -1,\\n    /**@ch 觸發 Free Game（MG 專用；server: FreeGame）*/\\n    FreeGame = 0,\\n    /**@ch 乘倍（server: Multiplier）*/\\n    Multiplier = 1,\\n    /**@ch 升級（server: Upgrade）*/\\n    Upgrade = 2,\\n    /**@ch 符號轉換（server: Transfer）*/\\n    SymbolConvert = 3,\\n    /**@ch GRAND JP（FG 專用；server: Grand）*/\\n    GrandJP = 4,\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 單格描述子 */\\nexport interface SegmentDescriptor {\\n    type: FeatureWheelSegmentType;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 落點結果（PLAY_SPIN callback 回傳） */\\nexport interface SpinResult {\\n    index: number;\\n    type: FeatureWheelSegmentType;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 轉輪格數（固定 12 格） */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT = 12;\\n\\n/** @ch 每格角度（12 格均勻 30°） */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE = 360 / FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 轉動額外圈數（獎輪手感，單一值 · DR-14）\\n * 注意：值越大峰值角速度越高，12 格重複圖樣易觸發車輪錯覺（視覺反向）。\\n * 與 ROTATE_TIME 搭配控制峰值速度，使其遠低於格距一半（15°/frame@60fps）。\\n * ⚠️ 由 10 格(36°)改 12 格(30°)後臨界值從 18°→15°/frame 收緊，本次未重調轉速參數。\\n */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_EXTRA_CIRCLES = 2;\\n\\n/** @ch 未知 type 的預設 icon 索引 */\\nexport const DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX = 0;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch type → SpriteChange icon 索引對照（前端本地，須與 prefab SpriteFrame 陣列順序對應）\\n * ⚠️ DR-12：此對照的「順序語意」與 prefab 圖序須人工核對，dev 斷言只驗數量/key 集合\\n */\\nexport const TYPE_ICON_CONFIG: Readonly<Partial<Record<FeatureWheelSegmentType, number>>> = {\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame]: 0,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier]: 1,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade]: 2,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert]: 3,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP]: 4,\\n    // None 無 icon（不顯示），刻意不列入；TypeToIconIndex 對未列值回預設、BindSegmentIcons 對 None 清空\\n};\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch type → icon 索引（BC-4）\\n * @param type 功能類型\\n * @returns SpriteChange 索引；未知 type 回傳預設索引\\n */\\nexport function TypeToIconIndex(type: FeatureWheelSegmentType): number {\\n    const idx = TYPE_ICON_CONFIG[type];\\n    return idx === undefined ? DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX : idx;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 判斷 type 是否為已知集合內\\n * @param type 功能類型\\n */\\nexport function IsKnownSegmentType(type: number): boolean {\\n    return TYPE_ICON_CONFIG[type as FeatureWheelSegmentType] !== undefined;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 本輪是否有「有效轉輪」需要演出（純投影，對應 FeatureWheelShowState 進入守衛 / BC-1）\\n *\\n * 語意：server RoundInfo.WheelFeatures 各項 Type 中，存在任一 ≠ None(-1) → 該輪觸發轉輪、需演出。\\n * 全為 None（如 server 給 [-1] / [-1,-1]）或缺值（null/空陣列）→ 無轉輪、不進演出 State。\\n *\\n * @param types RoundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w => w.Type)（缺值傳 null/undefined）\\n */\\nexport function HasActiveWheel(types: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined): boolean {\\n    return !!types && types.some(t => t !== FeatureWheelSegmentType.None);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 本輪是否有「respin 後段」要套用的轉輪效果 → 對應 FeatureResultShowState 進入守衛。\\n *\\n * 語意：WheelFeatures 各 Type 中存在 Upgrade / Multiplier / SymbolConvert → 末手 respin 後\\n * 需先演各自效果再做收分動畫。FreeGame / GrandJP / None 不計入（FG 收分在前段即做）。\\n *\\n * @param types RoundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w => w.Type)（缺值傳 null/undefined）\\n */\\nexport function HasPostRespinFeature(types: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined): boolean {\\n    return !!types && types.some(\\n        t => t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade ||\\n             t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier ||\\n             t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert,\\n    );\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 本輪轉輪是否落 FreeGame → 對應 ⑨Scatter 丟場 + ⑩進 FG。\\n * 語意：WheelFeatures 各 Type 中存在 FreeGame(0) → 進 FG 前需演 Scatter 丟場（也可能不演）。\\n *\\n * @param types RoundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w => w.Type)（缺值傳 null/undefined）\\n */\\nexport function HasFreeGameWheel(types: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined): boolean {\\n    return !!types && types.some(t => t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 預設 12 格 fallback 組成（server 整層無資料時用）\\n * 3 符號轉換 + 3 乘倍 + 3 升級 + 1 GRAND JP + 1 Free Game + 1 升級補滿\\n */\\nexport function GetDefaultSegments(): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n    return [\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame },\\n    ];\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch WheelData 第一層索引語意（0:主遊戲 1:免費遊戲） */\\nexport enum WheelDataLayer {\\n    MainGame = 0,\\n    FreeGame = 1,\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch server 介面隔離 adapter（BC-1 / BC-2）\\n * WheelData 結構：IIntAry[]，第一層 = WheelDataLayer（0:MG 1:FG），第二層 Data = 各格的功能類型 int。\\n * client enum 目前與 server 同號 → 直接 passthrough（驗證已知值，未知/缺格 → None 不顯示）。\\n * 若後端改號，改回此處加映射層即可（呼叫端與型別不變）。\\n * 整層無資料（缺層 / Data 非陣列 / Data 為空）→ 回預設 12 格。\\n * @param raw server 原始 WheelData（protocol.ar2es2Proto.IIntAry[]；用結構化簽章避免依賴 proto 型別，保住純邏輯層）\\n * @param layer 取主遊戲或免費遊戲那一層\\n * @returns 剛好 12 格的 SegmentDescriptor 陣列\\n */\\nexport function ParseServerWheelData(\\n    raw: ReadonlyArray<{ Data?: number[] | null }> | null | undefined,\\n    layer: WheelDataLayer,\\n): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n    const fallback = GetDefaultSegments();\\n\\n    // 整層無資料 → 全 fallback（BC-2 / 用戶確認：沒有任何資料時用原本預設）\\n    const layerData = Array.isArray(raw) ? raw[layer]?.Data : null;\\n    if (!Array.isArray(layerData) || layerData.length === 0) {\\n        return fallback;\\n    }\\n\\n    // 有資料：固定 12 格逐格採用（已知值直接用；未知值 / 缺格 / 非數字 → None 不顯示）\\n    const result: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n    for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n        const v = layerData[i];\\n        const type = (typeof v === 'number' && IsKnownSegmentType(v))\\n            ? (v as FeatureWheelSegmentType)\\n            : FeatureWheelSegmentType.None;\\n        result.push({ type });\\n    }\\n    return result;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 計算單調的絕對目標角（BC-3）\\n * 順時針（預設）→ z 角遞減；逆時針 → z 角遞增。兩方向落點 orientation 同為 baseAngle。\\n * Cocos +z 為逆時針，故順時針取負向 delta，再疊固定額外圈數，全程不變號（避免視覺反向）。\\n * 不沿用 MultiplierManager 的 angleDiff = target - start（會中途反向）。\\n * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n * @param currentAngle 輪盤當前角度（度，取自節點 eulerAngles.z）\\n * @param clockwise 是否順時針（預設 true）\\n * @returns 絕對目標角（度）；clockwise=true 時 < currentAngle，false 時 > currentAngle\\n */\\nexport function ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex: number, currentAngle: number, clockwise: boolean = true): number {\\n    const baseAngle = landIndex * FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE;\\n    const extra = FEATURE_WHEEL_EXTRA_CIRCLES * 360;\\n    if (clockwise) {\\n        // 順時針：z 角遞減。backwardDelta 取正向（0~360）使落點對齊 base，再多轉 extra 整圈\\n        const backwardDelta = NormalizeAngle(currentAngle - baseAngle);\\n        return currentAngle - backwardDelta - extra;\\n    }\\n    // 逆時針：z 角遞增。forwardDelta 取正向（0~360），等同 NormalizeAngle(baseAngle - currentAngle)\\n    const forwardDelta = NormalizeAngle(baseAngle - currentAngle);\\n    return currentAngle + forwardDelta + extra;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 正規化角度到 0~360（每次轉動結束後呼叫，防 BC-8 連續轉動的累積漂移 · DR-9）\\n * @param angle 任意角度（度）\\n */\\nexport function NormalizeAngle(angle: number): number {\\n    return ((angle % 360) + 360) % 360;\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":217,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":217}}"</outcome>

'退場動畫名稱' })\\n    private m_outAnimName: string = 'out';\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 是否播放中（重入守衛：進退場整段期間互斥）*/\\n    private m_isPlaying = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_DECLARE_EVENT.PLAY_DECLARE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_DECLARE_EVENT.PLAY_DECLARE:\\n                this.PlayDeclare(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n
